content.verdict: Amankora Thimphu is the only luxury lodge inside Bhutan's capital, hidden in a blue-pine forest a short drive from Tashichho Dzong. With just 16 fireplace suites, it offers honeymooners an urban-but-secluded counterpoint to the rural Aman lodges — perfect for a pre- or post-Tiger's-Nest stay that mixes city culture with forest quiet.
content.best_room: Every suite is the same generous size with a bukhari fireplace, hot stone bath, and king bed. Book a forest-view suite on the upper level for the most privacy and the best views of the surrounding pine canopy.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival in Thimphu
itinerary_7_nights.description: Drive 1.5 hours from Paro airport to Thimphu, the world's only capital without traffic lights. Welcome butter tea by the fire, in-suite hot stone bath, dinner of red rice and ema datshi at the Aman dining pavilion.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Tashichho Dzong and the Memorial Chorten
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning at the Memorial Chorten watching elderly Bhutanese circumambulate with prayer wheels. Afternoon at Tashichho Dzong, the king's working office and seat of the Je Khenpo. Stay for the flag-lowering ceremony at sunset.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Buddha Dordenma and Motithang takin preserve
itinerary_7_nights.description: Visit the giant golden Buddha Dordenma statue, one of the largest seated Buddhas in the world. Afternoon at the Motithang Takin Preserve to see Bhutan's national animal. Evening at a local archery match in the city stadium.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Day trip to Punakha
itinerary_7_nights.description: Drive over the 3,100m Dochula Pass with its 108 chortens. Visit Punakha Dzong at the confluence of the Mo Chhu and Pho Chhu rivers — Bhutan's most beautiful fortress. Picnic lunch by the river, return to Thimphu by evening.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Crafts and textiles
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning at the National Textile Museum studying centuries of weaving traditions. Afternoon visit to the Royal Painting School where students learn the 13 traditional Bhutanese arts. Couples spa treatment at the lodge in the late afternoon.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Drukpath day-hike
itinerary_7_nights.description: Section-hike of the Drukpath trail through blue pine forest and rhododendron groves. Picnic lunch at a high alpine lake. Sunset prayer flag tying at a hillside chorten — leave a flag for your marriage.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Departure
itinerary_7_nights.description: Final morning meditation in the Aman library, drive back to Paro airport for the early morning Druk Air departure.

caveats: Bhutan visa is issued only via licensed tour operators — Aman handles the paperwork but allow 4-6 weeks.
Sustainable Development Fee is $200 per person per night on top of the room rate.
Thimphu sits at 2,300m — drink water and pace your first day to acclimatize before higher hikes.
Wi-Fi is intentionally minimal — this is part of the Aman Bhutan experience but bring a Kindle or paperbacks.

faqs.question: Is Amankora Thimphu good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — it's small (16 suites), quiet, and the fireplace-and-hot-stone-bath combo is ideal for couples. It pairs especially well with Amankora Paro for a two-lodge trip.

faqs.question: When is the best time to visit?
faqs.answer: March-May for spring blooms and clear skies, or September-November for the Tsechu festivals and the cleanest mountain views.

faqs.question: How far in advance should we book?
faqs.answer: Four to six months ahead. Multi-lodge Amankora itineraries fill up especially fast during festival season.

faqs.question: Do we need a guide in Thimphu?
faqs.answer: Yes — Bhutanese law requires a licensed guide for all foreign visitors, included in your Aman package.

faqs.question: What's the best room type?
faqs.answer: All 16 suites are identical. Request an upper-floor forest-view suite for the most privacy and the best views.

faqs.question: How do we get to Amankora Thimphu?
faqs.answer: Fly into Paro International Airport. Amankora arranges the 1.5-hour transfer to the Thimphu lodge with a guide and driver who stay with you throughout your trip.
